SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics

Record Class Latency

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.Latency
Record Components:
storeMeanMs - mean store-path latency (ms)
storeMaxMs - max store-path latency (ms)
recoverMeanMs - mean recover-path latency (ms)
recoverMaxMs - max recover-path latency (ms)
storeP95Ms - 95th-percentile store-path latency (ms); 0 when unavailable
storeP99Ms - 99th-percentile store-path latency (ms); 0 when unavailable
recoverP95Ms - 95th-percentile recover-path latency (ms); 0 when unavailable
recoverP99Ms - 99th-percentile recover-path latency (ms); 0 when unavailable
public record Latency(double storeMeanMs, double storeMaxMs, double recoverMeanMs, double recoverMaxMs, double storeP95Ms, double storeP99Ms, double recoverP95Ms, double recoverP99Ms) extends Record
Wall-time latency of the failover store and recover paths, in milliseconds, derived from the failover.operation.duration timer. Mean and max are always present; p95/p99 are present for the local and prometheus sources (the timer publishes percentiles / histogram buckets) and 0 for shared-store, where per-instance percentiles cannot be merged (snapshots carry only mean/max). A 0 percentile therefore means "not available", not "zero latency".

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Latency(double storeMeanMs, double storeMaxMs, double recoverMeanMs, double recoverMaxMs)
    Convenience for sources that expose only mean/max (e.g. shared-store): percentiles default to 0.
    Latency(double storeMeanMs, double storeMaxMs, double recoverMeanMs, double recoverMaxMs, double storeP95Ms, double storeP99Ms, double recoverP95Ms, double recoverP99Ms)
    Creates an instance of a Latency record class.

  • Constructor Details

    • Latency

      public Latency(double storeMeanMs, double storeMaxMs, double recoverMeanMs, double recoverMaxMs)
      Convenience for sources that expose only mean/max (e.g. shared-store): percentiles default to 0.

    • Latency

      public Latency(double storeMeanMs, double storeMaxMs, double recoverMeanMs, double recoverMaxMs, double storeP95Ms, double storeP99Ms, double recoverP95Ms, double recoverP99Ms)
      Creates an instance of a Latency record class.
      Parameters:
      storeMeanMs - the value for the storeMeanMs record component
      storeMaxMs - the value for the storeMaxMs record component
      recoverMeanMs - the value for the recoverMeanMs record component
      recoverMaxMs - the value for the recoverMaxMs record component
      storeP95Ms - the value for the storeP95Ms record component
      storeP99Ms - the value for the storeP99Ms record component
      recoverP95Ms - the value for the recoverP95Ms record component
      recoverP99Ms - the value for the recoverP99Ms record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
